payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Ornate dark reddish-brown lacquered wooden chair with a pierced, carved backrest, curved front legs and a visible front stretcher; patterned upholstered seat is partially visible and the sides are slightly edge-cropped in the narrow vertical crop — appears to be photographed at approximately 1.5 meters distance.

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"dark reddish-brown carved wooden chair","long_description":"Ornate dark reddish-brown lacquered wooden chair with a pierced, carved backrest, curved front legs and a visible front stretcher; patterned upholstered seat is partially visible and the sides are slightly edge-cropped in the narrow vertical crop — appears to be photographed at approximately 1.5 meters distance.","attributes":["dark reddish-brown","lacquered wood","ornate carved backrest","pierced cutouts","glossy finish","patterned upholstered seat (partial)","curved legs","front stretcher","edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
